finding_results.notes: Reworked the morning-after rules exchange and late-day work exchanges to remove stacked confirmation turns, increase idiolect contrast (Eli's self-revising logistics voice vs Marisol's concrete boundary voice), and add an interruption that flips leverage (Marisol cuts off Eli's sloganizing at lines 416-418).

summary: All packet-flagged exchanges were revised to eliminate transcript-like confirmation volleys, enforce distinct speaker cadence, and add a measurable leverage shift while preserving continuity and chapter intent.
